'''竏嗾-sh-h-t''' ('''katashetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jettison|jettison]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-sh-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jettison|jettison]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾-sh-h-t
|-
! Lemma
| katashetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitashetoko|thitashetoko]] || [[word:jitashetoko|jitashetoko]] || [[word:shitashetoko|shitashetoko]] || [[word:kitashetoko|kitashetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutashetoko|thuthutashetoko]] || [[word:jujutashetoko|jujutashetoko]] || [[word:shushutashetoko|shushutashetoko]] || [[word:kukutashetoko|kukutashetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutashetoko|thutashetoko]] || [[word:jutashetoko|jutashetoko]] || [[word:shutashetoko|shutashetoko]] || [[word:kutashetoko|kutashetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutashetoko|thutashetoko]] || [[word:jutashetoko|jutashetoko]] || [[word:shutashetoko|shutashetoko]] || [[word:kutashetoko|kutashetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetashetoko|thetashetoko]] || [[word:jetashetoko|jetashetoko]] || [[word:shetashetoko|shetashetoko]] || [[word:ketashetoko|ketashetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotashetoko|thothotashetoko]] || [[word:jojotashetoko|jojotashetoko]] || [[word:shoshotashetoko|shoshotashetoko]] || [[word:kokotashetoko|kokotashetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotashetoko|thotashetoko]] || [[word:jotashetoko|jotashetoko]] || [[word:shotashetoko|shotashetoko]] || [[word:kotashetoko|kotashetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotashetoko|thotashetoko]] || [[word:jotashetoko|jotashetoko]] || [[word:shotashetoko|shotashetoko]] || [[word:kotashetoko|kotashetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦtashetoko|thﾃｦtashetoko]] || [[word:jﾃｦtashetoko|jﾃｦtashetoko]] || [[word:shﾃｦtashetoko|shﾃｦtashetoko]] || [[word:kﾃｦtashetoko|kﾃｦtashetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatashetoko|thathatashetoko]] || [[word:jajatashetoko|jajatashetoko]] || [[word:shashatashetoko|shashatashetoko]] || [[word:kakatashetoko|kakatashetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatashetoko|thatashetoko]] || [[word:jatashetoko|jatashetoko]] || [[word:shatashetoko|shatashetoko]] || [[word:katashetoko|katashetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatashetoko|thatashetoko]] || [[word:jatashetoko|jatashetoko]] || [[word:shatashetoko|shatashetoko]] || [[word:katashetoko|katashetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
